summary: Frontend-only regression retest completed for the requested mobile/desktop chart-navigation fixes. Authenticated mobile menu opens reliably after login, mobile quick-ask CTA routes to /astrologer with normal click flow, and chart context remains preserved on both mobile dedicated page and desktop dashboard panel.
action_items: No blocking issues found in requested regression scope.
Optional: run one manual real-device tap pass (iOS/Android) for additional confidence.
critical_code_review_comments: No critical code issues found in the reviewed files for this scope.
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded blueprint user from /app/tests/seed_ai_users.json; no new seed created.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL tested with blueprint account in mobile (390x844) and desktop (1920x1080). Verified authenticated mobile menu panel opens post-login, mobile Venus quick-ask navigates to /astrologer without JS fallback, and Venus context/draft persists. Desktop Venus selection keeps user on /dashboard and primes astrologer dashboard panel with Venus context.
rca of the issue: Previously reported failures were not reproducible after the latest fixes. Reproduction path now passes: /auth login -> /dashboard mobile menu toggle opens panel; mobile natal chart Venus select -> quick-ask click navigates to /astrologer with Venus focus and prompt draft; desktop Venus select keeps dashboard route and sets dashboard astrologer active focus.
